name: Cheeseball
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 ounces corned beef or ham, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cream cheese and chopped corned beef or ham.
2. Add the chopped green onions, Lawry's seasoning salt, and Worcestershire sauce to the bowl. Mix until all ingredients are well incorporated.
3. Form the mixture into a ball.
4. Place the ball in a covered container and refrigerate until ready to serve.
5. Serve with crackers.
